
## Musical Treat

</br>

:::: {.center}


::: {when-meta="session:1"}

<!-- Scary Pockets: Harder, Better, Faster, Stronger. (Daft Punk Cover) -->
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RHu0ALxqUIo width="800" height="400">}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:2"}

<!-- Stravinsky: Finale - Suite from Firebird (LA Philharmonic) -->

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rYcz-g8WpMc width="80%" height="400px">}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:3"}

<!-- Nina Simone: You'll Never Walk Alone -->

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gj940Pr_uMs width="80%" height="400px">}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:4"}

<!-- Buddy Green: Orange Blossom Special -->

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3fKAWa0iyUI width="80%" height="400px">}}

[Live Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rV4YJwRStKI)

:::


::: {when-meta="session:5"}

<!-- TODO: Change. Not seasonal for fall... -->
<!-- Pierre Cochereau: Te Deum [Alternatim] -->

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ohDqL6pjpjY width="80%" height="400px">}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:6"}

<!-- 8-Bit Big Band: Super Mario Praise Break -->

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LBIo5QuEeaA width="80%" height="400px">}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:7"}

<!-- Barber: Excursions, Op.20 No.4 -->

{{< video https://youtu.be/UkaXAA8P4_8?si=9-1ISKdOnXEYvtDJ&t=484 width="80%" height="400px">}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:8"}

<!-- Cory Henry & the Funk Apostles. Halloween 2020 Full Show -->

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vb-_qqmOcCI width="80%" height="400px">}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:9"}

<!-- Brad Mehldau: Blackbird -->

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kruKQCY77bc width="80%" height="400px">}}

:::

::: {when-meta="session:10"}

<!-- Charles Mingus - Moanin' (Mingus Big Band, Live from Times Square) -->

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=__OSyznVDOY width="80%" height="400px">}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:11"}

<!-- Respighi: Pini di Roma --> 

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XgE7PUXTrlo width="80%" height="400px">}}

You might recognize the finale from [Fantasia 2000](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7EBy1lBXgtE)


:::

::: {when-meta="session:12"}

<!-- TODO: Change. Not seasonal for spring -->
<!-- Philippe Sly-Minstrel. Why do the Nations So Furiously Rage Together? -->
<!-- {{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yNcZgu9yFjU width="80%" height="400px">}} -->

<!-- Oscar Peterson Big 4: Nigerian Marketplace -->

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mDHYgUiNxAo width="80%" height="400px" >}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:13"}

<!-- TODO: Link to specific work -->
<!-- Rachmaninoff: Complete Preludes & Etudes-Tableaux -->

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k8ucSWeBcr8 width="80%" height="400px">}}

:::


::: {when-meta="session:14"}

<!-- Voces8 / Jonathan Dove: Ring Out Wild Bells -->

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqulCHS4aGs width="80%" height="400px">}}

:::

::::
